position_sizing_rule: Stake starts at $1.50. After a losing trade, stake is multiplied by 2.2. After any winning trade, stake resets to $1.50.
risk_controls: Stop the session immediately if cumulative drawdown exceeds $180
Stop the session immediately if total trades reach 60

explicit_ambiguities.ambiguity: Definition of the synthetic volatility stream instrument
explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assume the instrument provides a volatility index value per minute that can be traded as a directional bet on volatility increase
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: A different instrument definition could alter the volatility dynamics, affecting trade outcomes and drawdown calculations

explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assume it means a bullish signal that the next minute's volatility will increase, triggering a long position on the synthetic volatility instrument
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: If interpreted as a different market direction or time horizon, entry timing and position direction could change, impacting performance

explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assume drawdown is measured as the maximum cumulative loss from the highest equity point reached during the session
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: Alternative drawdown definitions (e.g., rolling window or absolute loss) could trigger the session stop earlier or later, affecting risk exposure

explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assume zero transaction costs and no slippage when entering or exiting trades
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: Including realistic costs could reduce profitability and increase drawdown, potentially causing the session to stop earlier
